name: auto-paper-collecter
description: Personal research-paper radar. Fetches the latest papers and code repos for your keyword subscriptions across arXiv, Crossref (IEEE/ACM), Semantic Scholar, GitHub and RSS; then the running model expands the queries, filters for computer-science relevance, writes summaries, detects hot sub-fields, and emits a Markdown + HTML digest. Pure Python stdlib, zero dependencies, no AI API key required.
